summary: A WABC NY Radio audio interview with Acting ICE Director Todd Lyons reformatted as a vertical clip: a static headshot over a DHS/ICE blue background with an animated audio waveform and word-by-word caption subtitles. Lyons argues Democratic officials are wrong to think the public supports doxxing or violence against ICE agents. It is a static talking-head/radio interview repackage with no music, footage, or genre styling.
notable_text: WABC NY Radio / TODD LYONS Acting ICE Director / captions: "Democratic elected officials", "agents and their families?", "that they think these"
